placements.overview: School of Basic Sciences, VELS Institute of Science, Technology and Advanced Studies is a private institute and is located in Chennai, Tamil Nadu. School of Basic Sciences, VELS Institute of Science, Technology and Advanced Studies courses are offered to students at the UG and PG levels. The institute offers courses in Full Time mode. School of Basic Sciences, VELS Institute of Science, Technology and Advanced Studies offers a total of 3 courses in stream such as Science. Some of the popular courses offered at the institute are B.Sc. and M.Sc. These courses are offered to students across several specialisation such as Chemistry. Further, the fee for all these courses ranges between INR 1,00,000 to 1,02,000. Apart from this, the School of Basic Sciences, VELS Institute of Science, Technology and Advanced Studies campus has a state-of-the-art infrastructure with all the advanced facilities.

faqs.answer: Manonmaniam Sundaranar University Tamil Nadu is one of the eminent institute which offers quality education to the students. The university is named after the renowned Tamil Poet Scholar, Professor P. Sundaram Pillai. MSU Tirunelveli is recognised by the UGC and accredited by the NAAC A Grade. MSU's commitment to academic excellence, combined with its focus on community engagement and skill development, makes it a good option for many.

Manonmaniam Sundaranar University admissions 2025 are both merit and entrance-based. Candidates have to qualify for all the rounds of the selection process. Find below the detailed process for MSU admissions 2025:

Manonmaniam Sundaranar University admission process 2025 starts with the application process. Candidates can download the application form from the university's official website. The duly filled application form has to be sent either through post or submitted in person at the concerned department at MSU. However, the application and entrance test fee will be paid online, and candidates have to attach the pay slip along with two copies of the online bank challan with the application form.

Admission to all the PG courses at Manonmaniam Sundaranar University is either merit-based or entrance-based. Candidates have to qualify for either university-level or state-level entrance exams such as TANCET for the selection of respective courses like MBA/PGDM. For other courses like MSc, MA, MCom, and BBA, the selection is based on merit scores obtained in the last qualifying exam. The university also offers UG courses through its affiliated colleges, with merit-based admissions to these courses.

After the completion of all the selection rounds, candidates have to appear for the counselling process for the respective courses. Later on, the university will release the merit list in various rounds of the selected candidates. Students who find their names on the merit list need to pay a certain amount of fee to secure their seats.

reviews.review_text: In my college, Wi-Fi connections were available. Classrooms were digital, and projectors were present. reviews.review_heading: Average good college for Pharmacy just for teaching and practicals.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms, library, and laboratory are all good and comfortable. But there is no Wi-Fi for students. The canteen has no proper management (fans, chairs, limited tables). Mostly junk food is available. For outdoor games, only a cricket bat is available. Indoor games include carrom and chess.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the campus is very nice. Even when it is away from the city, it has a nice environment.
reviews.review_text: The environment is very nice. It has beautiful green vibes when it rains. The campus is large. It also has a large open area and enough parking space. The building infrastructure is good and still developing. The hostel is good, and the canteen facility is also nice.

reviews.review_heading: The faculty and placement of this college are very good compared to other colleges in the city.
reviews.review_text: The college provides the best facilities. The campus is well maintained. The campus is spread across 82 acres. Our college has one of the best libraries, with over 15,000 books and well-maintained group discussion rooms with teacher guidance. A computer lab, a park for yoga, fresh air in the morning, and almost separate grounds for each and every game. Food served in a mess is average. One thing that does not work properly is Wi-Fi; it is average.

reviews.review_heading: It is a great college for students.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi was available in our classrooms. Practical laboratory was also digital. The library was good, and several books were available. Elevator was also available on campus. The canteen facility was good. Sports and games were also available.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The college has the largest campus in the city the campus area is about 53 acres. The largest area amongst all institutions. The college environment is very excellent. Hostel facilities are also good the boys' hostel and girl's hostels both have separate canteens and separate amenities are provided.

highlights.summary:
The TG EAPCET 2026 registration has commenced for Bharat School of Pharmacy admission to BPharma and BE/BTech courses. The deadline to register without a late fee is Apr 4, 2026. The entrance exam for BPharm is scheduled for May 4 and May 5, 2026, while the BE/BTech exam will be held from May 9 to May 11, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

reviews_list.review_title: Review of Bharat School of Pharmacy.

review_content.Placements: Our seniors who got passed out before our batch haven't gotten any placements from our college but during our admission, one of my seniors got placed in one MNC with an average package of 2 LPA last year and our college doesn't provide any placements to the students who are going to study at this college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college infrastructure is good but it doesn't have any hostels. They are providing hostels with the help of 3rd-party hostels, which are available outside the college campus and mostly boys and girls hostels are near each other. Because of the 3rd-party hostel, there is no security.

reviews_list.review_title: Not satisfied after joining our college.

review_content.Placements: At our college, there are 120 students. They offer a package of about 2 lakh per annum, as per my knowledge and they also say there are no placements in our college. The top recruiting companies for BPharm courses are Dr.Reddy Labs and more pharma companies and there are no internships from our college. From our course, you can start an industry or get a medical job.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure available in our college is not up to par; they don't have proper lab equipment, no proper classrooms, no proper washrooms and they don't have any digital classes. Coming to the library, they don't have a place to study for students; they have only some books and no other books to refer to, which is not sufficient for all students in college. And coming to the hostel, I am a dayschollar but my friends who are in the hostel say they have good food because they stay in private hostels because our college has no hostel facility inside the college. When it comes to sports, there is nothing to say; it is our wish to participate in free periods.

reviews_list.review_title: I suggest not being admitted to this college for Pharma.D.

review_content.Placements: There are no placements offered for Pharm.D students. Pharma.D graduates do not have work opportunities as compared to other streams. Placement drives might happen sometimes, but they're only for B.Pharma students. No companies have ever come to recruit us Pharma.D students.
review_content.Infrastructure: They show a whole different campus while joining. The real campus of the college is still under construction and will never be completed. But they make us sit on another campus, which is amazing. Not all labs are equipped enough to support all students, and the equipment in the labs is way too old. You will learn nothing from labs except in pharmacognosy.

reviews_list.review_title: Dissatisfied because of the reasons I have mentioned, but extracurricular activities are good.

review_content.Placements: Ours is the 6th batch after the introduction of this course. I have graduated recently in 2021 September. 50% of students chose to go abroad, and others try their luck here themselves. Internships are a mandatory part of the course, and only a few people got placed in the hospital that too only in some colleges (1 or 2). Various roles are offered, you can choose wide career options. It completely depends on your knowledge and patience to get placed in a good field/company.
review_content.Infrastructure: Only a few people get the opportunity to perform practically as they always allowed us to perform batch-wise. Many times, there was a shortage of chemicals. Wi-Fi is not available for students. For BCP, there is no allocated block. We need to shift as per their rules.

reviews_list.review_title: I am dissatisfied because of no placements.

review_content.Placements: Placements are not provided in our college, and students should search for a job on their own. There are fewer job drives from a poor company. The salary offered is between Rs. 10,000 to 15,000 per month.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is not available on the campus, and there is no digital library. Classrooms are fitted with projectors, and labs are maintained properly. Lab equipment is good. Internship at the hospital goes good, but transportation facility is not provided to the hospital. The hostel is not available in this college, and there is no attention to sports. The canteen is of poor quality.

reviews_list.review_title: I am dissatisfied about the placements provided in our college.

review_content.Placements: Students should maintain 65% to 75% in academics to better salary packages and recruiting companies. The salary is offered based on the ability of students how they can work for a particular company. The academic percentage of students is useful to get good salaries in different recruiting companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college provides good infrastructure, library and labs. There are no hostels in our college, so we are staying in private hostels. Sports are conducted during the fest, and we will play different games tournaments like cricket, volleyball, kabaddi, etc., in other colleges.

review_summary.college_name: Bharat School of Pharmacy Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.title: Review of Bharat School of Pharmacy.

content.Placements: Our seniors who got passed out before our batch haven't gotten any placements from our college but during our admission, one of my seniors got placed in one MNC with an average package of 2 LPA last year and our college doesn't provide any placements to the students who are going to study at this college.
content.Infrastructure: Our college infrastructure is good but it doesn't have any hostels. They are providing hostels with the help of 3rd-party hostels, which are available outside the college campus and mostly boys and girls hostels are near each other. Because of the 3rd-party hostel, there is no security.

individual_reviews.title: Not satisfied after joining our college.

content.Placements: At our college, there are 120 students. They offer a package of about 2 lakh per annum, as per my knowledge and they also say there are no placements in our college. The top recruiting companies for BPharm courses are Dr.Reddy Labs and more pharma companies and there are no internships from our college. From our course, you can start an industry or get a medical job.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure available in our college is not up to par; they don't have proper lab equipment, no proper classrooms, no proper washrooms and they don't have any digital classes. Coming to the library, they don't have a place to study for students; they have only some books and no other books to refer to, which is not sufficient for all students in college. And coming to the hostel, I am a dayschollar but my friends who are in the hostel say they have good food because they stay in private hostels because our college has no hostel facility inside the college. When it comes to sports, there is nothing to say; it is our wish to participate in free periods.

individual_reviews.title: I suggest not being admitted to this college for Pharma.D.

content.Placements: There are no placements offered for Pharm.D students. Pharma.D graduates do not have work opportunities as compared to other streams. Placement drives might happen sometimes, but they're only for B.Pharma students. No companies have ever come to recruit us Pharma.D students.
content.Infrastructure: They show a whole different campus while joining. The real campus of the college is still under construction and will never be completed. But they make us sit on another campus, which is amazing. Not all labs are equipped enough to support all students, and the equipment in the labs is way too old. You will learn nothing from labs except in pharmacognosy.

individual_reviews.title: Dissatisfied because of the reasons I have mentioned, but extracurricular activities are good.

content.Placements: Ours is the 6th batch after the introduction of this course. I have graduated recently in 2021 September. 50% of students chose to go abroad, and others try their luck here themselves. Internships are a mandatory part of the course, and only a few people got placed in the hospital that too only in some colleges (1 or 2). Various roles are offered, you can choose wide career options. It completely depends on your knowledge and patience to get placed in a good field/company.
content.Infrastructure: Only a few people get the opportunity to perform practically as they always allowed us to perform batch-wise. Many times, there was a shortage of chemicals. Wi-Fi is not available for students. For BCP, there is no allocated block. We need to shift as per their rules.

individual_reviews.title: I am dissatisfied because of no placements.

content.Placements: Placements are not provided in our college, and students should search for a job on their own. There are fewer job drives from a poor company. The salary offered is between Rs. 10,000 to 15,000 per month.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is not available on the campus, and there is no digital library. Classrooms are fitted with projectors, and labs are maintained properly. Lab equipment is good. Internship at the hospital goes good, but transportation facility is not provided to the hospital. The hostel is not available in this college, and there is no attention to sports. The canteen is of poor quality.

review_summary.college_name: DAV College for Girls, Yamuna Nagar Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Everything in college was very good. I enjoyed and learned very much in my bachelor's degree.

content.Placements: We were around 60-65 students in BCA. The highest package offered was 6-7 LPA and the lowest was 2-3 LPA. Infosys, ADP, IDFC first Bank, and ICICI Bank were top recruiting companies. Around 60% got internships. Top roles were software developed, graphic designer, web designing, web developed, etc.
content.Infrastructure: All important facilities were available like labs were properly well-equipped with high technology, the library had all types of books, and Wi-Fi was everywhere. Classrooms had projectors, white boards, black boards, etc. Everything was good and highly appreciated, canteen was also good.

individual_reviews.title: A glimpse into D.A.V College for Girls.

content.Placements: About 85% of students in my course get placed. There are some top recruiting companies like Mahindra and TCS recruit for B.Com. The package offered by these companies depends on different levels of job roles. The highest package can range between 5-6 LPA, whereas, the minimum package is around 30-50K. 55% of students get placed under placement drive. The top roles are Executive Director, Management, Accountant, and Sales Executive.
content.Infrastructure: College provides good infrastructure and a clean environment surrounded by trees, flowers, etc. It provides Wi-Fi facilities, top-notch classrooms, and a maintained library. We can visit the library and get any book anytime and we can sit and read in the library. Labs are well-maintained, have a new kind of technological equipment, and a good faculty member. College also offers hostel facilities for students and provides good quality food, which is made carefully in a hygienic environment.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: This college is very good for those girls who want to study in a girls' college.

content.Placements: Placements are very rare in our college. Companies do come here, but they leave after providing training. The percentage of placements is very low. The average package for all the students who have taken Success Point from here must be at least Rs 4 to 5 Lacs.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is also average. We have facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library. Students are very happy with the Wi-Fi facility, and we also have medical facilities available. A canteen is also provided in our college.

individual_reviews.title: The best college DAV college for girls .

content.Placements: The placement of our college is so good as in our college the last semester students are eligible for placement activity the company that visited our college are Flipkart, Amazon, wipro, Google as many are as the average package we offers to us 15 Lacs per annum .
content.Infrastructure: Hostel facility of our college is so good as the food service of our college is so good as many type of food are three as made through hygenice process of I talk about the room facility of our hostel it is so good as three students are living in one room as good facility are there in every room .

individual_reviews.title: One of the best college- DAV college .

content.Placements: The placement cells in our college is excellent because we have the best placement offered by our institution. The students in their final and last semesters are eligible for the placement. A number of reputable and large companies have visited our institution, including TCS, Amazon, Flipkart, and Wipro, because of the excellent placement package we provide (INR 15 Lacs per year).
content.Infrastructure: The hostel at our college is excellent, and each student has a private room with excellent amenities. I like living there since the hostel has a wonderful mess facility, and it has a great location. The mess food is tasty and the mess menu changes every week.

review_content.Placements: I am the second B.Sc batch student from this college. I recommend all students to choose this college. Placements are so good. I personally got into this college via a joint entrance exam.

review_content.Faculty: Three exams are conducted every year by WBUHS but the college takes internal exams and assignments for best topic clarity and group study. She really helps us a lot.
